title: フェブラリーSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In preparation for the decisive February Stakes,
Copano Rickey does all she can to improve her
luck—from taking baths in lucky directions to
drinking beverages of her lucky color.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having regained her confidence in feng shui,
Copano Rickey enters the emotional
head-to-head with Hokko Tarumae, who carries
the weight of her hometown on her back.
